vulnerability.title: Uninstall tftp-server Package
vulnerability.description: The tftp-server package can be removed with the following command: $ sudo dnf remove tftp-server
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # CAUTION: This remediation script will remove tftp-server # from the system, and may remove any packages # that depend on tftp-server. Execute this # remediation AFTER testing on a non-production # system! if rpm -q --quiet "tftp-server" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "tftp-server" fi

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only removes the tftp-server package. This is a standard package removal with no impact on authentication, bootloader, or critical system services. The only risk is removal of dependent packages, which can be evaluated before execution.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential removal of packages that depend on tftp-server; Loss of TFTP service functionality if needed
